name: Lemon Yogurt Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients into a separate bowl.
2. Lightly beat the eggs in a large bowl.
3. Add oil and sugar; mix well.
4. Add yogurt and lemon juice, then add the dry ingredients and mix well.
5. Pour the mixture into two well-greased loaf pans.
6. Bake at 325 degrees F for one hour.
